nodes.x: Behold, thus saith the Lord unto you my servants, it is expedient in me that the elders of my church should be called together, from the east and from the west, and from the north and from the south,…

Behold, thus saith the Lord unto you, my servants, it is expedient in me that the elders of my church should be called together, from the east and from the west, and from the north and the south, by letter — or some other way.

Behold thus s&ith the Lord unto you my servants it is expedient in me that the elders of my church should be called together, from the east and from the west, and from the Dorth and from the south, by letter or some other way.

1. Behold, thus saith the Lord unto you my servants, it is
    expedient in me that the Elders of my Church should be called
    together, from the east and from the west, and from the north and
    from the south, by letter or some other way.
And it shall come to pass, that inasmuch as they are faithful, and exercise faith in me, I will pour out my Spirit upon them in the day that they assemble themselves together.
And it shall come to pass that they shall go forth into the regions round about, and preach repentance unto the people.
And now, verily I say unto you, a commandment I give unto you, that as many as have come up hither, that can stay in the region round about, let them stay;
And it shall come to pass that except this people repent and turn unto the Lord their God, they shall be brought into bondage; and none shall deliver them, except it be the Lord the Almighty God.
And many shall be converted, insomuch that ye shall obtain power to organize yourselves according to the laws of man;
That your enemies may not have power over you; that you may be preserved in all things; that you may be enabled to keep my laws; that every bond may be broken wherewith the enemy seeketh to destroy…
That we should be saved from our enemies, and from the hand of all that hate us;
That we also may be like all the nations; and that our king may judge us, and go out before us, and fight our battles.
Behold, I say unto you, that ye must visit the poor and the needy and administer to their relief, that they may be kept until all things may be done according to my law which ye have received. Amen.
And they shall look to the poor and the needy, and administer to their relief that they shall not suffer; and send them forth to the place which I have commanded them;
